caption: A news broadcast features a group of men gathered in what appears to be an indoor setting. A man in a dark jacket and scarf is speaking into a cluster of microphones held by reporters, while other men stand beside him, including one in a white shirt and another in a dark jacket. On-screen graphics include the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a red banner at the bottom with the text "सब्रاط चौधरी, विजय सिन्हा को भी PM ने बधाई दी". The sides of the screen feature small inset portraits of men labeled "सब्रاط चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार", with titles such as "डिजी CM" and "मंत्री". The top of the screen displays a headline stating "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". Across the sequence, the camera angle and the positions of the men remain largely consistent, though the man speaking shifts slightly as he addresses the microphones.
